title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 515.160 - Depositions may be taken and read
text:
515.160.  Depositions may be taken and read. — Depositions of witnesses or parties regularly taken in the cause may be read in evidence before the referees, as in cases of trials before the court.
(RSMo 1939 § 1150) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 984; 1919 § 1434; 1909 § 2004
